title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you questions related to the theme from Part 3. Express and develop your opinions with your partner.

content.task: The examiner will ask questions related to environmental responsibility and individual vs. government action.

questions.question: Do you think individuals can really make a difference, or is it up to governments?
Some people say that protecting the environment is a luxury for rich countries. What is your opinion?
How do you think our daily habits will have changed in twenty years' time?

script.text: Now I'd like to ask you some questions related to the environment.
Do you think individuals can really make a difference, or is it up to governments?
Some people say that protecting the environment is a luxury for rich countries. What is your opinion?
How do you think our daily habits will have changed in twenty years' time?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
